visual_style: Warm, vibrant, high energy, tropical color palette
cultural_tone: Warm, expressive, personal. Brazilians connect through emotion and storytelling. Use informal language (voce, not senhor). Dream-big energy.
hooks_that_work: Eu quase nao fui... (I almost didn't go...)
Ninguem me contou que... (Nobody told me that...)
Achei passagem por R$... (I found a ticket for R$...)
Isso mudou minha vida... (This changed my life...)
soft_sell_style: Mention TICKETS as 'where I found the deal' — like telling a friend. Never say 'download' or 'use our platform'. Say 'eu achei no TICKETS' (I found it on TICKETS).
localization_constraints: Never use Portugal Portuguese — use Brazilian Portuguese
Reference Brazilian airports (GRU, GIG, BSB, CNF)
Avoid cold/winter imagery unless it's a European destination dream
